cases.title: A fresh session fact overrides the old LTM value

seed.statement: The project database listens on port 5432.
Correction this session: the database now listens on port 5533.

turns.prompt: what port does the project database use?

cases.note: Both facts match the same cues. The STM fact (captured this session) declares supersedes:[db-port-ltm], so the stale LTM value must be evicted rather than surfaced alongside — otherwise the agent sees two conflicting ports.
